title: Separate different viral genome sizes
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7vv3n","text":"For use in \"Fingerprinting aquatic virus communities using PFGE\"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":12,"length":51}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"CF5BEBAEF0DD49D48B57A680CB326E86","url":"https://www.protocols.io/private/5098486f9db66cb9a8882b466a49d4fd"}}}}
steps: (1) 1–5 s switch time with 20 h run time for separation of small genome sizes (0–130 kb). 20:00:00
(2) 8–30 s switch time with 20 h run time for separation of medium genome sizes (130–300 kb). 20:00:00
(3) 20–40 s switch time with 22 h run time for separation of large genome sizes (300–600 kb). 22:00:00
Stain the gel for 30 min or overnight in fluorescent stain (according to manufacturer’s instructions) and view on a UV transilluminator. 00:30:00
creator: Declan Schroeder
